title: Request resource
description: A call-type resource (HTTP, GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket). One .request.json file per request in a collection.

type.description: Resource type. Only 'http' is implemented today.

method.description: HTTP method. Required when type is 'http'.

url.description: Request URL. May contain variable placeholders e.g. {{base_url}}/api/users. Required when type is 'http'.

headers.description: Request headers. Values may contain {{var}} placeholders.

body.description: Request body (e.g. JSON). May contain {{var}} placeholders.

preScript.description: Rhai script run before the request. Not yet implemented.

postScript.description: Rhai script run after the request. Not yet implemented.
